g.text: Wallet adapters, Framer Motion, Supabase client
NullBot chat surfaces, Telegram link page, gift
profile QR / receipts, support feedback, explorer,
shield Wallet Adapters, local salt generation,
Routes: ai, checkout, invoices, merchants, users,
support, sdk, mcp, scanner, proxy, dps, telegram,
Supabase tables for invoices, profiles, cards, telegram
encrypted address fields, merchant hashes, realtime
1. Frontend is both product UI and docs/developer surface.
2. Backend is not just CRUD; it is a relayer, oracle signer, AI gateway, Telegram controller, and checkout host.
3. Wallet contract and core contract are intentionally split: invoice state lives in core, wallet/card/gift/oracle logic lives in
4. SDKs and MCP package are productized consumers of the same hosted API platform.
5. testing-website is a sample merchant integration that proves the SDK + webhook architecture.
